title: Blood test with AI spots four dementia-related brain diseases with 92.3% accuracy
description: Many people living with dementia never receive an accurate diagnosis, in part because Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's disease and related conditions are notoriously difficult to tell apart and often occur together. Now, a new tool based on artificial intelligence and a simple blood draw may provide clarity.

title: AI may impact "lucrative job market linked to IT services": EY report
description: Artificial Intelligence will significantly reshape India's skilled workforce and its IT sector. EY's report highlights potential job market shifts. While India's economic growth remains strong, adapting to AI's evolution is crucial. Policymakers must address technological changes alongside other global challenges to maintain India's growth trajectory and economic future.

description: Bareilly (Uttar Pradesh) [India], May 30: The 5th International Conference on Computational Techniques: Recent Trends and Issues (ICCT-2026), organised by the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Invertis University, brought together academicians, researchers, industry experts, technologists, entrepreneurs, and students over two days of keynote sessions, research presentations, technical discussions, and panel exchanges focused on artificial intelligence, data science, computational methods, and emerging technologies.

title: Emily Blunt Chooses Personal Touch Over AI for 'Disclosure Day' Sound Effects
description: In the upcoming film 'Disclosure Day,' Emily Blunt decided to create unique extraterrestrial sound effects herself, rather than using Artificial Intelligence, which she finds daunting. The film, directed by Steven Spielberg, focuses on revealing secret government intelligence about alien life.
content: Actress Emily Blunt opted to personally generate the unique sound effects for her role in the movie 'Disclosure Day,' avoiding the use of Artificial Intelligence. She expressed a preference for creating the alien noises herself due to her apprehensio... [724 chars]

title: AUKUS Allies Innovate Unmanned Undersea Vehicles
description: The United States, Britain, and Australia are collaborating on developing unmanned undersea vehicles within the AUKUS defence pact, aiming to counter China's influence in the Indo-Pacific. The initiative focuses on advanced technologies like artificial intelligence and hypersonics to enhance underwater operational capabilities.
content: The United States, Britain, and Australia have announced a collaborative effort to develop unmanned undersea vehicles as part of the AUKUS defence pact. This initiative, revealed by U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth, seeks to bolster maritime ca... [787 chars]
